# Design Decision

Use `AGENTS.md`, `trading-journal-brief-ch.md`, and relevant skills (`trading-journal-domain`, `tagging-conventions`, `product-design-review`) before answering.

For this decision:

`${input:decisionTopic:Describe the decision, proposal, or model question}`

Produce:

```markdown
## Decision

## Context

## Options Considered

## Recommended Path

## Objects & Boundary Impact
(Entry / Annotation / tag / group / view; Ingest / Entry Store / Annotation-Tag Index / Query Engine / Canvas / Render)

## Duplication & Tag Check
(one artifact + derived brief-highlight; correct tag placement entry vs annotation; each fact in its own group)

## Root-Cause & Scope Stance

## Validation (domain behavior)

## MVP Validation

## Docs or Code to Update
```
